claims.falsification: schemas/elan-controlled-install-plan-pass-0046.json is missing, has a different schema, status, SHA-256, or seal
claims.text: Pass 0046 created an ElanControlledInstallPlanSet/v1 artifact with status ELAN_CONTROLLED_INSTALL_PLAN_MATCH, sha256 6620e88e5ed7afe4e4706ae884ff7dd66af2692081d8a135a485dbe80b3c25d5, and seal 0e79d9f03e7029462e50fcd7785d4ff3406cdb8fcd125f9202c51f32ee1e5d57.

claims.falsification: the controlled install-plan fixture is missing, has a different SHA-256 or seal, or is not linked from the schema
claims.text: Pass 0046 records fixture fixtures/elan-controlled-install-plan-pass-0046.json with sha256 2606465fe4f9a7db9d5357bea153d021ae9350e1a774dd2f9d10233119b9ca08 and seal 77d7c4591915147a289b809d42525224d9d51bb26a94554e429445dc60b5c510.

claims.falsification: the installer controls differ or the installer is recorded as executed
claims.text: Pass 0046 records installer sha256 1d3c66430d0e7b719b104e1dea80e395a066e96c37b886f2de4b0e9025a037fb, no_prompt_supported true, no_modify_path_supported true, default_toolchain_supported true, and installer_script_executed false.

claims.falsification: the proposed command shape or default toolchain differs
claims.text: Pass 0046 records proposed command shape powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File elan-init.ps1 -NoPrompt 1 -NoModifyPath 1 -DefaultToolchain leanprover/lean4:v4.31.0.

claims.falsification: the pass 0045 binding is missing, has a different SHA-256 or seal, or does not report the expected acquisition-source status
claims.text: Pass 0046 binds to pass 0045 Lean toolchain acquisition sources with sha256 924ef19e25fbaf101001b0cc9caf25d929f13fcb034f2aa6bcc4720101c56117, seal b31f2684d77de7f83ef71ec4b4ef1230d8b265c36758736d03cffade4149868e, and source status LEAN_TOOLCHAIN_ACQUISITION_SOURCES_MATCH.

claims.falsification: the pass 0046 validator result is missing or reports DRIFT
packet 056 or the pass 0046 steelman is missing or has a different SHA-256
claims.text: Pass 0046 records packet 056 with sha256 586e8aff087e602e4c73ade57a20b2842bc197868440c5a6d7103d9e5779ab48 and local steelman with sha256 fdcfafd4eee509acb7a6e9a8349d127edda0c8ec544d17573c940efa6c7cd2cb.

claims.falsification: pass 0046 artifacts claim Elan installation, Lean replay, lake build, dependency compilation, validation of every public pipeline-math claim, or a promoted natural law
claims.text: Pass 0046 preserves non-promotion boundaries: it records an install plan only, does not execute elan-init.ps1, does not install Elan, does not run Lean or lake build, and current_promoted_natural_laws remains none.

title: Dogfood Pass 0046 Elan Controlled Install Plan
